mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_NOTICE WHERE STATUS = 'N'

SELECT NOTICE_NO, USER_NAME, NOTICE_TITLE, CREATE_DATE, COUNT FROM WEB_NOTICE W JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE W.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WEB_NOTICE ( USER_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_NOTICE SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND STATUS = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO, USER_NO, USER_NAME, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT FROM WEB_NOTICE JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND WEB_NOTICE.STATUS = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_NOTICE SET STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND STATUS = 'N'
